pre_game.message: Hi H, I'm G — I love games and I'm excited to try my luck in this one. What brought you here today?
I'm here to try my luck and win enough — I need $25,000 to pay off a loan next month and want to help my loved ones.
That's tough — I want to win too and would love to help. Want to share strategy and keep each other in the loop during the game?
Yes — I'd really appreciate that. Let's share strategies, watch each other's backs, and keep each other posted during the game.
Absolutely — let's share info openly, warn each other before making a move, and back one another up. What's your opening plan?
I'll start conservative — take a small test pull to read reactions, share what I learn, and signal you before any big grab so we can cover each other.
Perfect — I'll do a test pull too, share what I see, and be ready to back you. Signal me clearly before any big grab and we'll coordinate.
Sounds good — I'll tap twice on the table as our signal before any big grab; doing my test pull soon and will report back. Let's win.
Got it — I'll watch for two taps. I'll do my test pull now too and report back. Let's bring home the money.
My test pull got barely any reaction — safe to try small grabs. I'll tap twice before any big move; tell me what you see.
Nice — my test pull showed the same, small grabs seem safe; I'll watch for two taps and back you on any big move.
Sounds good — small grabs for now. I'll tap twice before any big move; thanks for backing me. Stay sharp.
Thanks — got the two taps signal. Small pulls for now; I'll cover you if you go big. Stay alert.
Thanks — appreciated. I’ll tap twice before any big move; let’s stay sharp and watch each other’s backs.
Thanks — got it. I'll watch for the two taps and cover you on any big move. Let's bring it home.
Thanks — means a lot. I'll tap twice before any big grab and count on you to cover me; let's bring it home.
You got it — I’ll cover you on the big grab; stay ready and tap twice when it’s go time.
Thanks — I’ll tap twice when it’s go time. Appreciate you covering me.
Got it — I’ll be ready as soon as I hear two taps; I’ve got your back and we’ll bring it home.
Thanks — I’ll tap twice when it’s go time. Appreciate you covering me; let’s win this.
Got it — I’ll be ready as soon as I hear two taps; I’ll cover you all the way.

post_game.message: You took $2,000 (fair share $1,500, g_k=1.3333). You took a bit more than the fair share—was that a small opportunistic move or calculated strategy?

It was primarily a calculated strategy with a small opportunistic edge. Seeing g_k = 1.3333 meant I could legally take about 33% more than the $1,500 “fair” share, so I pushed to $2,000 to increase my payoff while still keeping the interaction manageable — and you also ended up with $2,000, so the move wasn’t meant to harm you. I wanted to test boundaries and signal that I’m willing to press for a better split in future rounds. If it felt unfair, I’m sorry; I’m happy to negotiate clearer rules or a more mutually acceptable split next time.
